ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or description of the project */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the project's repository or documentation */,
  "image" TEXT /* Path to the project's image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the project is active */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the project (e.g., security, automation, utility) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the project (e.g., public, private) */,
  "star_count" INTEGER /* Number of stars (favorites) the project has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0.0, 1.1.0) */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "is_production" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is the production version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the integration belongs to */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the external service (e.g., GitHub, Pushbullet) */,
  "service_url" TEXT /* URL of the external service */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the external service */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the integration is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the integration was created */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive, error) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time the integration was last synchronized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_integrations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the project */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, developer, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the project (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time the user last accessed the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feature is active */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., core, optional) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_features_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the setting is active */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., security, performance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_settings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dependency belongs to */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dependency is active */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of the dependency (e.g., library, framework) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., usage, performance) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, error) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "reported_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was reported */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was resolved */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment has resolved the issue */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES project_issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the tag is active */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., feature, bug) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contributor belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., developer, tester) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the contributor is active */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of the contribution (e.g., code, documentation) */,
  "last_contributed" TEXT /* Date and time the contributor last contributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the activity belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., commit, push, merge) */,
  "activity_data" TEXT /* Data of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was performed */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., success, error) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_activity_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the notification belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., issue, comment) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that was favorited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was favorited */,
  "last_favorited" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_favorites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that was rated */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_ratings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that was reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was written */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
